detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: Emitted when the pressed state changes.
Emitted when the pseudo disabled state changes.
Emitted when the view is clicked.
Emitted when the view receives a long press gesture.
Returns whether the view is currently in the pressed state.
Returns whether the view is in the pseudo disabled state.
Returns whether clicking is currently allowed.
Returns the current key click policy.

detaileddescription.para: Multiple calls accumulate — each call adds an additional handler. If obj implements ConnectionTrackerInterface (e.g. inherits ConnectionTracker), the connection is automatically removed when obj is destroyed.
Supports member functions and stateless lambdas: view.ConnectClickedSignal(this,&MyClass::OnButtonClicked); view.ConnectClickedSignal(this,[](Viewv,constInputEvent&e){...});

parameterdescription.para: The object to connect to (must implement ConnectionTrackerInterface for auto-disconnect)
Member function pointer or functor with signature void(View, const InputEvent&)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

detaileddescription.para: Multiple calls accumulate — each call adds an additional handler. The handler is called with pressed=true on press-down and pressed=false on release. If obj implements ConnectionTrackerInterface, the connection is auto-removed on obj destruction.

parameterdescription.para: Member function pointer or functor with signature void(View, bool, const InputEvent&)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

detaileddescription.para: Multiple calls accumulate — each call adds an additional handler. Long press fires once when the gesture is detected (on press-down after the time threshold). Press release is reported separately via PressedChangedSignal.
The handler must return bool: return true to suppress the subsequent click event, or false to allow it.
If obj implements ConnectionTrackerInterface, the connection is auto-removed on obj destruction.

parameterdescription.para: Member function pointer or functor with signature bool(View, const InputEvent&)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining
A handle to a newly allocated InteractiveView

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to an InteractiveView handle.

detaileddescription.para: If the handle refers to an InteractiveView, the downcast produces a valid handle. Otherwise the returned handle is uninitialized.

simplesect.para: A handle to an InteractiveView or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: InteractiveView is a View subclass with interactive behavior built in.

detaileddescription.para: InteractiveView guarantees that an InteractiveTrait is attached for the lifetime of the view. It exposes the InteractiveTrait API directly, so callers do not need to go through EnsureInteractiveTrait().
InteractiveView is intended as a base class for clickable UI components such as Button and Checkbox. It can also be instantiated directly when a plain interactive container is needed.
